key_drivers: Iran-US war driving historic oil supply shock (+35% WTI weekly surge); Strait of Hormuz de facto closed
VIX at 31.89 (+8% today) signals severe risk-off; MOVE index +41% in 1 month signals rate volatility surge
Real yields falling (TIPS 1.82%, clear downtrend) strongly bullish for gold; ETF inflows 9th consecutive month
GDPNow slashed to 2.1% (from 3.0%) signals growth scare; credit spreads widening from 2.7% to 3.0%
DXY rising to 99.25 on safe-haven USD demand; SOX -6.5% weekly signals tech/risk-off rotation
RBA hawkish (3.85%, hike possible in March) but overwhelmed by risk-off; BoJ on hold due to geopolitical uncertainty

fallbacks_used: None required - all primary sources accessible or within 1-2 business day tolerance
data_quality.notes: EIA inventory data from week ending Feb 27 (released Mar 4). Oil price data reflects Mar 6 close; geopolitical situation ongoing.
